title: Ars Magica Story Hook
note: generate:element — a canonical Ars Magica complication to open or complicate an adventure, seed a Thread, or drive an offscreen faction move (see subsystems.md). Synthesised from Core Rules Ch.15 Story Ideas and confirmed against the Hooks / Tales of Mythic Europe supplements.

entries.value: A vis source is discovered, drying up, tainted, or being stolen/contested by another magus.
A Tribunal looms and rival covenants court allies — siding with one makes enemies of another.
A magus is framed for (or genuinely caught in) a serious breach of the Hermetic Code.
A mundane authority — lord, bishop, or abbot — threatens, sues for, or seizes covenant land.
A rival or neighboring covenant wages low-grade harassment that stays within the letter of the Code.
A faerie offers a bargain, plays a game with the covenant, or abducts someone into its court.
An infernal temptation surfaces — a diabolist, a corrupted ally, or an infernal vis source is uncovered.
A Church conflict erupts — a bishop preaches against heretics and marches to 'investigate' the covenant.
A magical beast or roused ancient spirit intrudes on the covenant or a nearby village.
A lost Hermetic text, forgotten Mystery, or fragment of ancient/non-Hermetic magic comes to light.
A villager, noble, or abbey comes to the covenant begging assistance against a monster, famine, or theft.
A Redcap arrives with Order news, a summons, a Wizard's War declaration, or a sensitive package.
A grog or covenfolk crisis flares — rebellion, a death, possession, or a covenfolk caught spying.
Warping or Twilight strikes a magus, or the covenant's aura surges, fades, or slips into a regio.
An apprentice or Gauntlet matter arises — finding, training, losing, or testing an apprentice.
